# apnsEnvironment

**Instance Property**

The Apple Push Notification service (APNs) environment associated with this container.

## Declaration

```swift
attribute String apnsEnvironment;
```

## Discussion

Possible values are [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit].[doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/DEVELOPMENT_ENVIRONMENT]and [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit].[doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/PRODUCTION_ENVIRONMENT].

## Getting the Identifier and Environment

- **containerIdentifier**: The string that identifies the app’s container.
- **environment**: The container environment, either development or production.
